name: projen (Code-Driven Project Configuration)
pricing_notes: Open source (Apache 2.0); AWS CDK team / Elad Ben-Israel

performance.notes: Project synthesis at build time; zero runtime overhead

agent_readiness.notes: Define project configuration as code (TypeScript) — generates package.json, tsconfig, .eslintrc, GitHub Actions, .gitignore, etc. npx projen new typescript generates scaffold. .projenrc.ts is source of truth. projen synth regenerates all config. Project types: NodeProject, TypeScriptProject, AwsCdkTypeScriptApp, JavaProject, PythonProject. Used extensively at AWS and CDK ecosystem. Prevents config drift across monorepos. Steep learning curve — designed for teams maintaining many repos.

gotchas: Steep learning curve — opinionated system to learn
Overwrites config files — can't manually edit generated files
best_when: Organizations maintaining many similar repos needing consistent config
Monorepos where config drift is a problem
Teams wanting code-driven project standards enforcement
avoid_when: Teams wanting flexibility to edit config files manually
summary: projen manages project configuration as code — define package.json, tsconfig, GitHub Actions, ESLint rules in .projenrc.ts, then synthesize. Prevents config drift across many repos. Used at AWS for CDK projects. Generates and manages all project files. Best for organizations maintaining many repos who want consistent, code-driven project standards. Not suitable for single projects where manual config management is fine.
